g.text: Robo67 — Peg-in-Hole Insertion Architecture (nodes → seams → primitives)
ROS 2 nodes (thin rclpy wrappers — no transition logic)
Canonical seams (pure · host-testable · pytest, no rclpy/ROS/cv2)
Quirks (carrot lead, below-surface gaps, held R)
live ONLY in the command-path adapters.
Both insertion nodes drive the SAME insertion_intent; the SIM vs REAL
difference is isolated in the adapter + safety profile they pick.
